gallery.title: Brand Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos and videos from our brand

items.name: TechHub
items.description: TechHub delivers cutting-edge electronics and audio gear trusted by customers nationwide.
items.overview: Founded in 2015, TechHub partners with leading manufacturers to bring premium tech products to local markets through MartPlace.
items.termsAndConditions: All TechHub products sold through MartPlace are covered by a standard 1-year manufacturer warranty. Returns accepted within 30 days in original packaging. Shipping times vary by location.
items.additionalDetails: Authorized dealer for major electronics brands. Business hours: Mon–Sat 9AM–8PM.

items.name: Fashion Forward
items.description: Trend-setting fashion for every style — sustainable, affordable, and always on trend.
items.overview: Fashion Forward curates contemporary apparel and accessories from ethical suppliers for the modern shopper.
items.termsAndConditions: Fashion Forward items may be exchanged within 14 days. Sale items are final sale unless defective.
items.additionalDetails: Free styling consultations available for orders over $100.

items.name: Home Comfort
items.description: Transform your living space with quality home and garden essentials.
items.overview: Home Comfort specializes in furniture, décor, and garden products that make houses feel like home.
items.termsAndConditions: Large furniture items require scheduled delivery. 60-day satisfaction guarantee on all furniture.
items.additionalDetails: White-glove delivery available in select metro areas.

items.name: Sports Gear Pro
items.description: Professional-grade sports equipment and apparel for athletes at every level.
items.overview: Sports Gear Pro has equipped athletes and fitness enthusiasts since 2010 with top-tier gear.
items.termsAndConditions: Equipment warranty varies by manufacturer. Custom team orders require 50% deposit.

items.name: Read More
items.description: Books, textbooks, and reading materials for all ages and interests.
items.overview: Read More is your local bookstore brand bringing literature and learning to MartPlace.
items.termsAndConditions: Digital downloads are non-refundable. Physical books returnable within 7 days.

items.name: FixIt Pro
items.description: Expert plumbing and home repair services you can trust.
items.overview: FixIt Pro connects licensed professionals with homeowners for reliable repair services.
items.termsAndConditions: Service quotes valid for 30 days. Emergency call-out fees apply after hours.
items.additionalDetails: Licensed and insured in all service areas.

items.name: Sparkle Home
items.description: Professional cleaning services for homes and businesses.
items.overview: Sparkle Home delivers spotless results with eco-friendly products and trained professionals.
items.termsAndConditions: Cancellations require 24-hour notice. Recurring service discounts available.

items.name: PowerPro
items.description: Licensed electrical services and power solutions for residential and commercial clients.
items.overview: PowerPro electricians bring safety-certified expertise to every job, big or small.
items.termsAndConditions: All electrical work complies with local codes. Warranty on labor: 1 year.
